_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Machine-readable record of completed and active phases of the Higgins Unity Framework. Each phase marks a coherent body of work that has reached a stable state (or is actively in progress). Phase completion is not retirement — it signals stable foundation for the next phase.

phases.name: CoDaWork 2026 submission content
phases.description: Core compositional-monitoring work submitted to CoDaWork 2026 in Coimbra. Three diagnostics (total variation, Aitchison distance, coherence residual), six EITT proofs (incl. 40,666-rock geochemistry), 25-error calibration catalogue, cross-domain validation (6 experiments), adversarial test suite with 17 total tests (10 pass / 7 designed failures). Gold Standard Working Example (10-step Higgins Decomposition, 23pp). Complete codawork2026/ self-contained package.

contents_stable_at_this_marker.ai_refresh_layer: ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json v3.0, cold-start test passed by Claude/ChatGPT/Grok/Gemini. Refresh chain formalized with archive-on-update protocol.

phases.what_stable_means: The content has passed cold-start testing across four AI systems, survived an adversarial review pass, has empirical validation on real datasets, and is ready to submit to peers. It is not frozen — small edits (typos, clarifications, abstract amendment) are fine — but the core mathematical claims and empirical findings are not expected to change from this point forward without new evidence.

phases.name: Information Mechanics — Experiment Ladder Closure
phases.description: EXP-16 through EXP-18b. Force domain entry, Compositional Uncertainty Principle, force-matter bridge, K₄ complete graph. 21 experiments total, ladder CLOSED.
key_results: K₄ complete graph: all 6 domain bridges validated

canonical_validation.note: All 19 experiments (EXP-01 through EXP-18b) re-run through canonical 12-step Higgins Decomposition pipeline v1.0. All 19 complete. Gauge R&R: 4/4 DETERMINISTIC (bit-identical on identical data). Canonical_Validation_Report.docx produced. Pipeline scripts distributed to all experiment folders for full reproducibility.

phases.name: EITT hardening for broader adoption
phases.mission_statement: Push EITT to pain point and protect users from pain. Make the tool reliable, accurate, and precise enough that CoDa practitioners can trust it with time-series analysis; document failure modes and boundary conditions clearly enough that no one walks off a cliff with it — especially in high-stakes domains like clinical/biomedical studies where misuse could lead a large-cohort study astray.

two_poles.pole_A_reveal_hidden_structure: Reveal the hidden geometry behind hypothesis testing on compositional time series. Document the mathematical substrate clearly enough that a practitioner can understand what EITT is measuring, why the second-order bound has the form it does, and how the shape/magnitude decomposition organizes their analytical choices.
two_poles.pole_B_establish_safety_fences: Articulate the boundary conditions where EITT should NOT be applied, the failure modes, the sample-size requirements, and the domain-specific red flags. Especially critical for clinical/biomedical settings where low power, small cohorts, boundary-close compositions, and treatment confounds can turn a reliable method into a misleading one.

exit_criteria_planned: EITT validated on at least three domains beyond the original four proofs

At least one failure mode has been observed in the wild and the safety document updated to prevent recurrence
Literature verification complete; novelty claims either confirmed or properly restricted to pieces that survive
exit_criteria_met: F17 Full Chain v3.0: 44 domains across ALL experiments (EXP-01→EXP-12). 38 real data, 5 physics, 1 prescribed. b>0 in 34/44 (77%). EXP-02 10/10 perfect. Long series 19/19 a≤0 (100%). India 5/5 all pass. Physics R²>0.99. (added 2026-04-19)

Nature's Confirmation Series: 23 nuclear/quantum systems (NS-01→NS-23). 22/23 (96%) confirm CoDa/HUF across 41 orders of magnitude. F17 physics: a_zero_doctrine 8/8 (100%). Universal 93% entropy bound at proton, spin, GW phase. Binding thesis: the simplex is the same everywhere. (added 2026-04-19)

phases.name: Consolidation and peer-reviewed publication
phases.description: After Phase 2 hardening, consolidate the framework into peer-reviewed venues. Candidate papers: structural-observations paper on five-object cluster, methodological paper on EITT for compositional time series, application papers in hydrology and ecology. A short monograph becomes possible when enough predictions have survived contact with reality.

operating_principles.past_is_strength: The past is our strength and our future. What was built in the Binaural Test Lab in 2024-2025 is the engineering DNA of everything in this repo. The math book did not invent the structure; the physics did. The screwdriver came first. Every new concept should be checked against the RWA lineage for prior embodiment. See ai-refresh/MASTER_LINEAGE.json for the full arc from DADC-DADI through Higgins Operator H1 to HUF/EITT, and for the cross-reference map connecting each current-repo document to its RWA ancestor.
operating_principles.due_diligence: All exploratory work gets divided into keep (promoted to main repo) or store (archived to dormant/ with reawaken conditions). Nothing is deleted; speculative work is preserved with honest labeling.
operating_principles.open_publication: All data, code, and documentation are publicly available. Failures and speculative branches are published alongside successes to everyone's gain.
operating_principles.safety_first: In domains where misapplication could cause harm (clinical, biomedical, regulatory), the safety fence documentation takes precedence over methodological claims. A tool that is clearly bounded is more valuable than a tool that claims more than it can deliver.
operating_principles.cold_start_testable: Any AI system should be able to read the repo cold and become productively oriented within one file read. ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json and science/*/INDEX.json are the entry points; ai-refresh/MASTER_LINEAGE.json provides the full arc of discovery.
operating_principles.adversarial_review_required: Every major finding undergoes adversarial review by multiple AI systems before being treated as stable. The review is structured through briefings in briefings/lit-verification-001/ and similar.
operating_principles.lineage_cross_reference: When any new document is promoted to the main repo, the author should add an entry to MASTER_LINEAGE.json's cross_reference_map identifying its RWA / H1 / or earlier-HUF ancestor. If no ancestor exists, note the absence explicitly. The continuity is the framework's strength.

Extreme extrapolation to Z=1500: Coulomb dominance transition at Z≈419, absolute instability at Z≈363, Z=522 fissions in 5 steps (7.2 GeV released), zero candidates above Z≈400, confirming Z=114-126 as the LAST island. canonical_hufgov_definition_locked.definition: HUF-GOV is a tool that produces a verifiably clean usable output to a known degree of certainty; the diagnostic of the output is open to interpretation by expert decision and open to modification by expert judgment.
canonical_hufgov_definition_locked.location: ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json identity section; full unpacking in science/governance/HUF_GOV_CANONICAL_DEFINITION.md
